children.code:
-- Subquery
SELECT name
FROM students
WHERE gpa > (
    SELECT AVG(gpa)
    FROM students
);
children.caption: Subquery
EXISTS

children.code:
-- Window Functions
SELECT 
    name,
    gpa,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY gpa DESC) as rank,
    AVG(gpa) OVER () as avg_gpa,
    SUM(gpa) OVER (PARTITION BY dept_id) as dept_sum
FROM students;
children.caption: Window Functions

children.code:
-- CTEs (Common Table Expressions)
WITH dept_avg AS (
    SELECT dept_id, AVG(gpa) as avg_gpa
    FROM students
    GROUP BY dept_id
)
SELECT s.name, s.gpa, d.avg_gpa
FROM students s
JOIN dept_avg d ON s.dept_id = d.dept_id
WHERE s.gpa > d.avg_gpa;
children.caption: CTEs
أنواع JOIN
Natural & Using

children.code:
-- Lateral Join (PostgreSQL)
SELECT t.*, pt.*
FROM tests t
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT COUNT(*) as pass_count
    FROM test_results tr
    WHERE tr.test_id = t.id AND tr.score >= 60
) pt;
children.caption: LATERAL Join

children.code:
-- Partial Index
CREATE INDEX idx_active 
ON orders(customer_id)
WHERE status = 'active';

-- Composite Index (order matters!)
CREATE INDEX idx_name_dept
ON employees(name, dept_id);

-- Include Columns (covering)
CREATE INDEX idx_name_dept
ON employees(name, dept_id)
INCLUDE (email, phone);
children.caption: فهارس خاصة
تعيين المستوى

children.title: ملاحظة
children.text: Level越高，越安全，但الـ concurrency أقل

children.code:
-- EXPLAIN ANALYZE
EXPLAIN ANALYZE 
SELECT * FROM students 
WHERE gpa > 3.0;

-- pgAdmin 
-- أو
SET enable_seqscan = off;
children.caption: تحليل الاستعلام
صيانة الفهارس
